current_phase.label: Control-plane UI maintenance and workspace standardization

current_milestone.label: Canonical docs, route-aware verification, and closeout workflow hardening

progress_summary: The control-plane UI remains the operator-facing surface for task orchestration, approvals, and runtime visibility. Task detail now shows backend-owned workflow gate state, including missing closeout evidence, expected locks, live-verification requirements, and fuzzy-route context, so the board cannot drift as far from real workflow completion.
next_step: Keep dashboard workflow-gate rendering synchronized with backend gate fields, and continue requiring served-route verification for any operator-visible workflow change.
